creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port had been updated to version 4.6.4 in https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=3968e59f6c62174afa7f526544d902f2b507d0bb on June 26 (master/main branch) which made it to the current quarterly branch (2021Q3) forked on July 3.  Please update your ports tree to the supported configuration.

(In reply to Masuji from comment #0)
> Can someone confirm if this is related?
No, it is not related.
